text:
Timeline according to the manga chronology

{| border="1" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="1" style="width: 600px; height: 600px;"
! rowspan="6" scope="row"|Before known history
| colspan="2"|The country of Xing is founded
|-
| colspan="2"|The country of Amestris is founded
|-
| colspan="2"|
Xerxes is destroyed (Chapter 75)
|-
| colspan="2"|The Philosopher from the West visits Xing
|-
| colspan="2"|The Philosopher from the East visits Amestris
|-
| colspan="2"|Pride is brought to life by Father
|-
! scope="row"|July 1558
| colspan="2"|Amestris attacks the city-state of Riviere
|-
! scope="row"|October 1661
| colspan="2"|The Civil War of Cameron begins
|-
! rowspan="5" scope="row"|Around 1700
| colspan="2"|Lust is brought to life by Father
|-
| colspan="2"|Greed is brought to life by Father
|-
|colspan="2"|Envy is brought to life by Father
|-
|colspan="2"|Sloth is brought to life by Father
|-
|colspan="2"|Gluttony is brought to life by Father
|-
!1799
|The Soapman case happens in Fisk
|-
! scope="row"|Around 1800
| colspan="2"|Greed leaves Father
|-
! scope="row"|March 1811
| colspan="2"|An open conflict between Amestris and Wellesley occurs
|-
! scope="row"|October 1835
| colspan="2"|Northwest of the present-day South City, Amestris attacks Aerugo, starting Aerugo's War
|-
! scope="row"|Around 1854
| colspan="2"|The man who will be changed into Wrath is born
|-
! scope="row"|1866
| colspan="2"|Van Hohenheim and Pinako meet
|-
! scope="row"|1872
| colspan="2"|Pinako marries
|-
! scope="row"|1873
| colspan="2"|Yuriy Rockbell is born
|-
! scope="row"|1874
| colspan="2"|Wrath is brought to life by Father
|-
! scope="row"|1878
| colspan="2"|Trisha Elric is born
|-
! scope="row"|1885
| colspan="2"|Roy Mustang and Maes Hughes are born
|-
! scope="row"|Around early 1890s
| colspan="2"|Hohenheim and Trisha are introduced and start living together
|-
! scope="row"|
1897
| colspan="2"|Izumi Harnet and Sig Curtis marry
|-
! rowspan="2" scope="row"|1898
| colspan="2"|Izumi attempts to perform Human Transmutation and fails
|-
| colspan="2"|Yuriy and Sarah Rockbell marry
|-
! scope="row"|1899
| colspan="2"|Edward Elric and Winry Rockbell are born
|-
! scope="row"|1899–1900
| colspan="2"|Ling Yao is born
|-
! scope="row"|1900
| colspan="2"|Alphonse Elric is born
|}
{| border="1" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="1" style="height: 600px; width: 600px; "
| style="text-align: center; "|Year
| style="text-align: center; "|Events of the Elric and Rockbell Families
| style="text-align: center; "|General Events
|-
| style="text-align: center; "|1901
|
|Start of the Ishval Civil War
|-
| rowspan="2" style="text-align: center; "|1904
|Hohenheim leaves his house
| rowspan="2"|
|-
|Trisha dies due to a plague (Chapter 21)
|-
| rowspan="2" style="text-align: center; "|1905
| rowspan="2"|
|Roy Mustang graduates at Military Academy (Chapter 58)
|-
|Berthold Hawkeye dies (Chapter 58)
|-
| rowspan="4" style="text-align: center; "|1908
| rowspan="2"|The Rockbells are killed in Ishval by Scar (Chapter 61)
|Führer King Bradley issues Order #3066 and State Alchemists are called to arms (Chapter 58)
|-
|Roy Mustang, Maes Hughes, Alex Armstrong, Riza Hawkeye, and Solf J. Kimblee go to the Ishval Civil War front (Chapter 59)
|-
|In the summer, Ed and Al are accepted as Izumi Curtis' apprentices (Chapter 21)
|Dr. Tim Marcoh goes missing
|-
|In the winter, Ed and Al finish their training and return to Resembool (Chapter 23)
|Barry murders Lenny and Cynthia
|-
| style="text-align: center; "|1909
|
|
Barry murders Reynolds

End of the Ishval Civil War
|-
| rowspan="2" style="text-align: center; "|1910
|Ed and Al attempt to perform the Human Transmutation and fail (Chapter 23)
|Barry murders Hendrick
|-
|Ed has two limbs replaced by automail (Chapter 24)
|Mustang meets and recruits Ed (Chapter 24)
|-
| rowspan="4" style="text-align: center;"|1911
|In October, Ed becomes a State Alchemist (Chapter 24)
|Barry murders Gadrielle
|-
|On October 3, the Elrics burn down their house in Resembool (Chapter 24)
|Elicia Hughes is born
|-
| rowspan="2" style="text-align: center; "|
| colspan="2" rowspan="1"|In May, a second skirmish happens near Fotset
|-
| style="text-align: left; "|Many soldiers die during the still ongoing war against Creta
|-
| style="text-align: center; "|Around 1912-13
|
|
The religion of Leto starts to get popular at Reole
|-
| rowspan="2" style="text-align: center; "|1912
| rowspan="2"|
|The Slicer Brothers are sentenced to death
|-
|Shou Tucker becomes a State Alchemist after creating a talking Chimera
|-
| style="text-align: center; "|1913
|The battle between the
Fullmetal Alchemist and Flame Alchemist takes place at Central City (Bonus Chapter: The Military Festival)
|
|-
| rowspan="2" style="text-align: center; "|Spring of 1914
| rowspan="1"|Ed and Al uncover Father Cornello's scheme at Reole (Chapter 1)
| rowspan="1"|
|-
| rowspan="1"|
| rowspan="1"|Scar begins his attacks against State Alchemists (Chapter 5)
|-
| rowspan="4" style="text-align: center;"|Summer of 1914
| rowspan="1"|Ed and Al get attacked by Scar (Chapter 6)
| rowspan="1"|Scar kills Shou and Nina Tucker (Chapter 5)
|-
| rowspan="1"|Ed returns to Resembool to fix his automail arm and meets Dr. Marcoh on the way (Chapter 8)
| rowspan="1"|A bloody and violent battle occurs in Reole
|-
| rowspan="1"|Ed and Al discover the truth about the Philosopher's Stone (Chapter 10)
| rowspan="1"|The Fifth Laboratory implodes (Chapter 13)
|-
| rowspan="1"|Edward gets hospitalized after 5th Lab Incident (Chapter 13)
| rowspan="1"|Maes Hughes is murdered by the Homunculus Envy (Chapter 15)
|-
| rowspan="2" style="text-align: center; "|Autumn of 1914
| rowspan="1"|Ed and Al travel to Dublith to see Izumi (Chapter 14)
| rowspan="1"|Wrath finds and fights Greed (Chapter 29)
|-
| rowspan="1"|Al is captured by Greed (Chapter 26)
| rowspan="1"|
Greed is reabsorbed by Father (Chapter 31)
|-
|Spring of 1915
|The battle between the homunculi (Chapter 85) /Ed and Al regain their bodies (Chapter 107)
|The Battle Between the Amestrian Military and Co. against the Homunculi (Chapter 85)
|-
| rowspan="1" style="text-align: center; "|1917
| rowspan="1"|
Edward Elric and Winry Rockbell Marry (Offical GuideBook)
|}
